note: Cards this user owns — determines which discount sources are active for lookup queries.

cards.name: Poalim Wonder
cards.notes: Voucher-based deals. Buy via Wonder app (links.bankhapoalim.co.il/wonder/benefit/ID — app only, not browser). 9 benefit IDs catalogued in discounts.json.

cards.name: HTZone PRO²
cards.notes: PRO² gives deepest discount tier. Also entitled to htzone_club tier. Webview URLs public — scraped headlessly via refresh_deals.py.

cards.name: Carrefour Club Visa
cards.notes: Loyalty/coins model — not instant discount. Best ROI on קרפור food shopping (10% back). Also earns at הוט סינמה.

cards.name: Siemens Corporate Visa
cards.issuer: unknown — check Siemens HR or card agreement
cards.notes: Benefits negotiated privately between Siemens and issuing bank. Not publicly scrapeable. Possible perks: Priority Pass lounge, travel insurance, local store discounts. Update once Yonatan checks with HR.
